'''nadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:general|general]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:general|general]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nadate|nadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nadatesher|nadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadatesherĂ«m|nadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nadatero|nadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nadateshĂ«|nadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadateshĂ«m|nadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinadatero|gokinadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinadateshĂ«|gokinadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadateshĂ«m|gokinadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonadankerom|gonadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonadankeshĂ«|gonadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadankeshĂ«m|gonadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonadankeya|gonadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nadaterom|nadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadatemu|nadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nadateya|nadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinadaterom|gokinadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadatemu|gokinadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinadateya|gokinadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nadadate|nadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nadadatesher|nadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadadatesherĂ«m|nadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nadadatero|nadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nadadateshĂ«|nadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadadateshĂ«m|nadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinadadatero|gokinadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinadadateshĂ«|gokinadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadadateshĂ«m|gokinadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonadadankerom|gonadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonadadankeshĂ«|gonadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadadankeshĂ«m|gonadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonadadankeya|gonadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nadadaterom|nadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadadatemu|nadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nadadateya|nadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinadadaterom|gokinadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadadatemu|gokinadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinadadateya|gokinadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠte|nĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠtesher|nĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠtero|nĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠtero|gokinĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠterom|nĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠtemu|nĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠdĂŠteya|nĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠterom|gokinĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠdĂŠteya|gokinĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafdafte|nafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafdaftesher|nafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafdaftesherĂ«m|nafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafdaftero|nafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafdafteshĂ«|nafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafdafteshĂ«m|nafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafdaftero|gokinafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafdafteshĂ«|gokinafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafdafteshĂ«m|gokinafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafdafnkerom|gonafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafdafnkeshĂ«|gonafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafdafnkeshĂ«m|gonafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafdafnkeya|gonafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafdafterom|nafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafdaftemu|nafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafdafteya|nafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafdafterom|gokinafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafdaftemu|gokinafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafdafteya|gokinafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
